subject: WM-0100 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. Verified docs-only balance/readability package cites M5 evidence and current M5 rerun hashes 0xfba70a5c/0x9ba83cb7; records missing docs/01_design/03_player_experience.md honestly; preserves Web demo-only, Windows controlled-test, save/replay, benchmark, product-gate, release and M8 boundaries.
